sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
raw_output:
ParticipantA: So, what kind of music do you like?
ParticipantB: I'm really into indie rock at the moment. Have you heard of any good indie rock bands lately?
ParticipantA: Yeah, I've been listening to a lot of Fleet Foxes and The Microphones. What about you?
ParticipantB: I've been listening to a lot of The National and Arcade Fire. Have you heard of them?
ParticipantA: Yeah, I'm a big fan of The National. How about other genres of music? Do you like any other types of music?
ParticipantB: I'm also really into hip-hop. I think Kendrick Lamar is one of the best rappers out there right now. How about you?
ParticipantA: Yeah, I really like Kendrick Lamar too. I also like a lot of electronic music, like Aphex Twin and Boards of Canada.
ParticipantB: Oh, I've heard of Aphex Twin but I haven't really listened to him. What's your favorite album of his?
ParticipantA: I really like his album "Richard D. James Album." Have you heard of it?
ParticipantB: No, I haven't. I'll have to check it out. What about other electronic artists? Do you like anyone else?
ParticipantA: I'm also really into DJ Shadow. Have you heard of him?
ParticipantB: Yeah, I've heard of him. I really like his album "Endtroducing.." What about you?
ParticipantA: Yeah, that's one of my favorites too. I also like Tycho and Four Tet.
ParticipantB: Oh, I've heard of Four Tet but I haven't really listened to him. What's your favorite album of his?
ParticipantA: I really like his album "New Energy." It's really chill and relaxing.
ParticipantB: Oh, I'll have to check that out. What about other types of music? Do you like any other genres?
ParticipantA: Yeah, I really like jazz too. I'm a big fan of Thelonious Monk and Miles Davis.
ParticipantB: Oh, I've heard of them but I haven't really listened to them. What's your favorite album of Monk's?
ParticipantA: I really like his album "Brilliant Corners." It's really creative and innovative.
ParticipantB: Oh, I'll have to check that out. What about other jazz artists? Do you like anyone else?
ParticipantA: I'm also really into John Coltrane. Have you heard of him?
ParticipantB: Yeah, I've heard of him. I really like his album "Giant Steps." What about you?
ParticipantA: Yeah, that's one of my favorites too. I also like Art Blakey and the Jazz Messengers.
ParticipantB: Oh, I've heard of them but I haven't really listened to them. What's your favorite album of theirs?
ParticipantA: I really like their album "Moanin'." It's really soulful and emotional.
ParticipantB: Oh, I'll have to check that out. What about other genres of music? Do you like any other types?
ParticipantA: Yeah, I'm also really into classical music. I'm a big fan of Bach and Beethoven.
ParticipantB: Oh, I've heard of them but I haven't really listened to them. What's your favorite piece by Bach?
ParticipantA: I really like his piece "Goldberg Variations." It's really beautiful and complex.
ParticipantB: Oh, I'll have to check that out. What about other classical artists? Do you like anyone else?
ParticipantA: I
